name: guava-guard-scanner
displayName: 🛡️ Guava Guard Scanner — OpenClaw Runtime Threat Guard
description: OpenClaw-compatible security plugin for runtime tool-call interception with guard-scanner threat intelligence and enforceable before_tool_call blocking.
author: Guava & Dee — Guava Parity Institute

before_tool_call.description: Block or warn on dangerous tool-call payloads before execution

mode.description: Runtime enforcement mode for the guard-scanner plugin.

enableAuditLog.description: Write runtime detections to audit.jsonl under the configured audit directory.

auditDir.description: Absolute directory for audit.jsonl output. Empty means ~/.openclaw/guard-scanner.

suiteTokenPath.description: Absolute path to the GuavaSuite JWT token used to auto-upgrade to strict mode.

configPath.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw runtime config file to inspect for plugin mode overrides.
